title: Community Health Access Act
raw_description: A bill relating to access to community health resources, reporting requirements, and coordination between public agencies.

title: Small Business Permit Modernization Act
raw_description: A bill to simplify permit application processes for small businesses and require digital submission options.

title: Public Transit Safety and Access Act
raw_description: A bill concerning transit safety improvements, service access, and reporting on transportation infrastructure needs.

title: Housing Redevelopment Incentive Act
raw_description: A bill to encourage redevelopment of underused properties for housing and mixed-use community development.
